steps.title: Show expanded musical sources
steps.content: The underlined claim says that as nueva canción spread beyond Chile, the range of musical traditions in its foundation expanded. The best detail should show influence from a non-Chilean tradition.

steps.title: Use an outside tradition
steps.content: A discusses political commentary, C names an Andean flute also used in Chile, and D discusses artists' countries rather than musical traditions. Influence from Mexican corrido shows the movement incorporating a broader musical tradition. The answer is B.
